# Henrique Dubugras

Co-founder and CTO of Brex. Brazilian entrepreneur and YC alum.

## Compiled Truth

Henrique Dubugras is the co-founder of Brex, the corporate card and financial infrastructure company. He co-founded Brex with Pedro Franceschi in 2017 after moving to the US from Brazil.
---
- **2017** | founding — Co-founded Brex with Pedro Franceschi.
---
- **2024** | milestone — Brex reached $500M ARR under his technical leadership.
